untranslatable_reason: Signal requires order book depth depletion (50-60%) and spread percentile metrics (>75th) which are not available in the allowed indicator set. Price deviation from 20-day MA by 1.8 standard deviations cannot be directly expressed without custom volatility normalization. Volume on one side cannot be distinguished directionally with available indicators.
translation_notes: Partially translated using available indicators: price_pos_20 approximates extreme price deviations (values <0.18 or >0.82 suggest deviation from MA), bb_bandwidth serves as spread/volatility proxy, vol_ratio_20 approximates volume imbalance. However, the core microstructure conditions (order book depth depletion, bid-ask spread percentile, one-sided volume) require real-time market microstructure data not present in OHLCV-based indicators. Exit conditions use price reversion toward MA midpoint. Stop loss set at 1.0 SD equivalent; hold time set to 1 day (60 minutes in intraday context cannot be precisely modeled).
